---
title: "Feb 25"
author: "Dhananjani Welagedara"
date: "2026-02-20"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Skewness corrected
```{r}
library(moments)
set.seed(123)

B <- c(2, 12, 5)
m <- length(B)
tau <- 5
beta0 <- 12
gamma0 <- c(0.05, 0.07, 0.06)
alpha0 <- c(10, 12, 15)
p <- c(0.9, 0.8, 0.85)
q <- c(0.2, 0.15, 0.3)

n_sim <- 10000
S_values <- c(1:30)

# X_j
X_true <- sapply(1:m, function(j) {
  alpha0[j]*(1 - exp(-gamma0[j]*(p[j]-q[j])*tau))/(p[j] - q[j])
})

# True system reliability
rho_true <- beta0/(beta0 + sum(gamma0*alpha0*exp(-gamma0*(p - q)*tau)))
cat("True system reliability:", rho_true, "\n")

# Logit of true reliability (for normality assessment)
theta_true <- log(rho_true / (1 - rho_true))

# One Monte Carlo simulation
one_simulation <- function(S) {
  
  N_0 <- rpois(1, S*beta0*tau)
  beta_hat <- N_0/(S*tau)
  
  gamma_hat <- numeric(m)
  alpha_hat <- numeric(m)
  
  for (j in 1:m) {
    Lambda_j <- S*gamma0[j]*(alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j])*X_true[j])*tau
    N_j <- rpois(1, Lambda_j)
    if (N_j == 0) return(NA)
    
    gamma_hat[j] <- N_j/(S*tau*(alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j])*X_true[j]))
    alpha_hat[j] <- N_j/(S*gamma_hat[j]*tau) + (p[j] - q[j])*X_true[j]
  }
  
  denom <- beta_hat + sum(gamma_hat*(alpha_hat - (p - q)*X_true))
  if (denom <= 0) return(NA)
  
  rho_hat <- beta_hat/denom
  return(rho_hat)
}

# Storing results
rho_storage <- vector("list", length(S_values))

results_S <- data.frame(
  S = S_values,
  rho_true = rho_true,
  mean_rho_hat = NA,
  sd_rho_hat = NA,
  abs_bias = NA,
  skew_rho_hat = NA)

for (i in seq_along(S_values)) {
  S_val <- S_values[i]
  
  rho_hat_vec <- replicate(n_sim, one_simulation(S_val))
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_hat_vec[!is.na(rho_hat_vec)]
  
  results_S$mean_rho_hat[i] <- mean(rho_hat_vec)
  results_S$sd_rho_hat[i] <- sd(rho_hat_vec)
  results_S$abs_bias[i] <- abs(mean(rho_hat_vec) - rho_true)
  
  # Logit transform + CLT scaling
  theta_hat_vec <- log(rho_hat_vec / (1 - rho_hat_vec))
  W_vec <- sqrt(S_val) * (theta_hat_vec - theta_true)
  
  # Skewness of scaled logit (correct)
  results_S$skew_rho_hat[i] <- skewness(W_vec)
  
  rho_storage[[i]] <- rho_hat_vec
}

print(results_S)

# Skewness threshold
threshold_skew <- 0.08
first_normal_index <- NA

for (i in seq_along(S_values)) {
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_storage[[i]]
  theta_hat_vec <- log(rho_hat_vec / (1 - rho_hat_vec))
  W_vec <- sqrt(S_values[i]) * (theta_hat_vec - theta_true)
  
  if (is.na(first_normal_index) && abs(skewness(W_vec)) < threshold_skew) {
    first_normal_index <- i
    break
  }
}

if (is.na(first_normal_index)) {
  cat("No S reaches approximate normality.\n")
} else {
  S_normal_threshold <- results_S$S[first_normal_index]
  cat("Approximate normality first achieved for S =", S_normal_threshold, "\n")
  
  # Identify the indices
  i_before <- max(1, first_normal_index - 1)  # make sure not <1
  i_normal <- first_normal_index
  i_after  <- min(length(S_values), first_normal_index + 1)  # make sure not > max S
  
  # Function to plot histogram with normal curve overlay
  plot_histogram <- function(index, title_suffix) {
    W_vec <- sqrt(S_values[index]) * (log(rho_storage[[index]] / (1 - rho_storage[[index]])) - theta_true)
    
    hist(W_vec, probability = TRUE, breaks = 25, col = "lightblue",
         main = paste(title_suffix, "(S =", results_S$S[index], ")"),
         xlab = "rho_true - rho_hat")
    curve(dnorm(x, mean(W_vec), sd(W_vec)), col = "red", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
    abline(v = mean(W_vec), col = "darkgreen", lwd = 2)
  }
  
  # Plot each separately
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))
  plot_histogram(i_before, "Before Normality")
  plot_histogram(i_normal, "Normality Achieved")
  plot_histogram(i_after, "After Normality")
  
  # QQ plots
  plot_qq <- function(index, title_suffix) {
    W_vec <- sqrt(S_values[index]) * (log(rho_storage[[index]] / (1 - rho_storage[[index]])) - theta_true)
    qqnorm(W_vec, main = paste(title_suffix, "(S =", results_S$S[index], ")"))
    qqline(W_vec, col = "red", lwd = 2)
  }
  
  # Plot each separately
  par(mfrow = c(1, 1), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))
  plot_qq(i_before, "QQ Before Normality")
  plot_qq(i_normal, "QQ Normality Achieved")
  plot_qq(i_after, "QQ After Normality")
}

```

# Increase pj
```{r}
library(moments)
set.seed(123)

B <- c(2, 12, 5)
m <- length(B)
tau <- 5
beta0 <- 12
gamma0 <- c(0.05, 0.07, 0.06)
alpha0 <- c(10, 12, 15)
p_orig <- c(0.9, 0.8, 0.85)
q <- c(0.2, 0.15, 0.3)

n_sim <- 10000
S_val <- 26  # fixed S


X_true <- function(p) {
  sapply(1:m, function(j) {
    alpha0[j] * (1 - exp(-gamma0[j] * (p[j] - q[j]) * tau)) / (p[j] - q[j])
  })
}


rho_true <- function(p) {
  beta0 / (beta0 + sum(gamma0 * alpha0 * exp(-gamma0 * (p - q) * tau)))
}
cat("Base true system reliability:", rho_true(p_orig), "\n")


one_simulation <- function(S, p) {
  
  X_t <- X_true(p)
  
  N_0 <- rpois(1, S * beta0 * tau)
  beta_hat <- N_0 / (S * tau)
  
  gamma_hat <- numeric(m)
  alpha_hat <- numeric(m)
  
  for (j in 1:m) {
    Lambda_j <- S * gamma0[j] * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]) * tau
    N_j <- rpois(1, Lambda_j)
    if (N_j == 0) return(NA)
    
    gamma_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * tau * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]))
    alpha_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * gamma_hat[j] * tau) + (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]
  }
  
  denom <- beta_hat + sum(gamma_hat * (alpha_hat - (p - q) * X_t))
  if (denom <= 0) return(NA)
  
  rho_hat <- beta_hat / denom
  return(rho_hat)
}


increase_vec <- c(0, 0.05, 0.10, 0.20)
increase_labels <- paste0(c(0, 5, 10, 20), "%")

results <- data.frame(
  Increase = increase_labels,
  p_values = NA,
  rho_true = NA,
  mean_rho_hat = NA,
  sd_rho_hat = NA)

for (i in seq_along(increase_vec)) {
  p_new <- p_orig * (1 + increase_vec[i])
  p_new <- pmin(p_new, 1)  # ensures no p_j > 1
  
  # Save p_j values as string
  results$p_values[i] <- paste(round(p_new, 3), collapse = ", ")
  results$rho_true[i] <- rho_true(p_new)
 
  rho_hat_vec <- replicate(n_sim, one_simulation(S_val, p_new))
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_hat_vec[!is.na(rho_hat_vec)]
  
  results$mean_rho_hat[i] <- mean(rho_hat_vec)
  results$sd_rho_hat[i] <- sd(rho_hat_vec)
}

print(results)
```

# Decrease pj
```{r}
library(moments)
set.seed(123)

B <- c(2, 12, 5)
m <- length(B)
tau <- 5
beta0 <- 12
gamma0 <- c(0.05, 0.07, 0.06)
alpha0 <- c(10, 12, 15)
p_orig <- c(0.9, 0.8, 0.85)
q <- c(0.2, 0.15, 0.3)

n_sim <- 10000
S_val <- 26  # fixed S

X_true <- function(p) {
  sapply(1:m, function(j) {
    alpha0[j] * (1 - exp(-gamma0[j] * (p[j] - q[j]) * tau)) / (p[j] - q[j])
  })
}

rho_true <- function(p) {
  beta0 / (beta0 + sum(gamma0 * alpha0 * exp(-gamma0 * (p - q) * tau)))
}
cat("Base true system reliability:", rho_true(p_orig), "\n")

one_simulation <- function(S, p) {
  
  X_t <- X_true(p)
  
  N_0 <- rpois(1, S * beta0 * tau)
  beta_hat <- N_0 / (S * tau)
  
  gamma_hat <- numeric(m)
  alpha_hat <- numeric(m)
  
  for (j in 1:m) {
    Lambda_j <- S * gamma0[j] * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]) * tau
    N_j <- rpois(1, Lambda_j)
    if (N_j == 0) return(NA)
    
    gamma_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * tau * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]))
    alpha_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * gamma_hat[j] * tau) + (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]
  }
  
  denom <- beta_hat + sum(gamma_hat * (alpha_hat - (p - q) * X_t))
  if (denom <= 0) return(NA)
  
  rho_hat <- beta_hat / denom
  return(rho_hat)
}

decrease_vec <- c(0, 0.05, 0.10, 0.30)
decrease_labels <- paste0(c(0, 5, 10, 30), "%")

results_decrease <- data.frame(
  Decrease = decrease_labels,
  p_values = NA,
  rho_true = NA,
  mean_rho_hat = NA,
  sd_rho_hat = NA)

for (i in seq_along(decrease_vec)) {
  p_new <- p_orig * (1 - decrease_vec[i])
  
  results_decrease$p_values[i] <- paste(round(p_new, 3), collapse = ", ")
  results_decrease$rho_true[i] <- rho_true(p_new)
  
  rho_hat_vec <- replicate(n_sim, one_simulation(S_val, p_new))
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_hat_vec[!is.na(rho_hat_vec)]
  
  results_decrease$mean_rho_hat[i] <- mean(rho_hat_vec)
  results_decrease$sd_rho_hat[i] <- sd(rho_hat_vec)
}

print(results_decrease)
```

# Increase qj
```{r}
library(moments)
set.seed(123)

B <- c(2, 12, 5)
m <- length(B)
tau <- 5
beta0 <- 12
gamma0 <- c(0.05, 0.07, 0.06)
alpha0 <- c(10, 12, 15)
p <- c(0.9, 0.8, 0.85)   # fixed
q_orig <- c(0.2, 0.15, 0.3)

n_sim <- 10000
S_val <- 26  # fixed S


X_true <- function(p, q) {
  sapply(1:m, function(j) {
    alpha0[j] * (1 - exp(-gamma0[j] * (p[j] - q[j]) * tau)) / (p[j] - q[j])
  })
}


rho_true <- function(p, q) {
  beta0 / (beta0 + sum(gamma0 * alpha0 * exp(-gamma0 * (p - q) * tau)))
}
cat("Base true system reliability:", rho_true(p, q_orig), "\n")

one_simulation <- function(S, p, q) {
  
  X_t <- X_true(p, q)
  
  N_0 <- rpois(1, S * beta0 * tau)
  beta_hat <- N_0 / (S * tau)
  
  gamma_hat <- numeric(m)
  alpha_hat <- numeric(m)
  
  for (j in 1:m) {
    Lambda_j <- S * gamma0[j] * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]) * tau
    N_j <- rpois(1, Lambda_j)
    if (N_j == 0) return(NA)
    
    gamma_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * tau * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]))
    alpha_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * gamma_hat[j] * tau) + (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]
  }
  
  denom <- beta_hat + sum(gamma_hat * (alpha_hat - (p - q) * X_t))
  if (denom <= 0) return(NA)
  
  rho_hat <- beta_hat / denom
  return(rho_hat)
}

increase_vec <- c(0, 0.20, 0.40, 0.80)
increase_labels <- paste0(c(0, 20, 40, 80), "%")

results <- data.frame(
  Increase = increase_labels,
  q_values = NA,
  rho_true = NA,
  mean_rho_hat = NA,
  sd_rho_hat = NA)

for (i in seq_along(increase_vec)) {
  q_new <- q_orig * (1 + increase_vec[i])
  q_new <- pmin(q_new, 1)  # cap at 1
  
  results$q_values[i] <- paste(round(q_new, 3), collapse = ", ")
  results$rho_true[i] <- rho_true(p, q_new)
  
  rho_hat_vec <- replicate(n_sim, one_simulation(S_val, p, q_new))
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_hat_vec[!is.na(rho_hat_vec)]
  
  results$mean_rho_hat[i] <- mean(rho_hat_vec)
  results$sd_rho_hat[i] <- sd(rho_hat_vec)
}

print(results)
```

# Decrease qj
```{r}
library(moments)
set.seed(123)

B <- c(2, 12, 5)
m <- length(B)
tau <- 5
beta0 <- 12
gamma0 <- c(0.05, 0.07, 0.06)
alpha0 <- c(10, 12, 15)
p <- c(0.9, 0.8, 0.85)   # fixed
q_orig <- c(0.2, 0.15, 0.3)

n_sim <- 10000
S_val <- 26  # fixed S

X_true <- function(p, q) {
  sapply(1:m, function(j) {
    alpha0[j] * (1 - exp(-gamma0[j] * (p[j] - q[j]) * tau)) / (p[j] - q[j])
  })
}

rho_true <- function(p, q) {
  beta0 / (beta0 + sum(gamma0 * alpha0 * exp(-gamma0 * (p - q) * tau)))
}
cat("Base true system reliability:", rho_true(p, q_orig), "\n")

one_simulation <- function(S, p, q) {
  
  X_t <- X_true(p, q)
  
  N_0 <- rpois(1, S * beta0 * tau)
  beta_hat <- N_0 / (S * tau)
  
  gamma_hat <- numeric(m)
  alpha_hat <- numeric(m)
  
  for (j in 1:m) {
    Lambda_j <- S * gamma0[j] * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]) * tau
    N_j <- rpois(1, Lambda_j)
    if (N_j == 0) return(NA)
    
    gamma_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * tau * (alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]))
    alpha_hat[j] <- N_j / (S * gamma_hat[j] * tau) + (p[j] - q[j]) * X_t[j]
  }
  
  denom <- beta_hat + sum(gamma_hat * (alpha_hat - (p - q) * X_t))
  if (denom <= 0) return(NA)
  
  rho_hat <- beta_hat / denom
  return(rho_hat)
}

decrease_vec <- c(0, 0.20, 0.40, 0.60)
decrease_labels <- paste0(c(0, 20, 40, 60), "%")

results <- data.frame(
  Decrease = decrease_labels,
  q_values = NA,
  rho_true = NA,
  mean_rho_hat = NA,
  sd_rho_hat = NA)

for (i in seq_along(decrease_vec)) {
  q_new <- q_orig * (1 - decrease_vec[i])
  q_new <- pmax(q_new, 0)  # ensure q_j >= 0
  
  results$q_values[i] <- paste(round(q_new, 3), collapse = ", ")
  results$rho_true[i] <- rho_true(p, q_new)
  
  rho_hat_vec <- replicate(n_sim, one_simulation(S_val, p, q_new))
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_hat_vec[!is.na(rho_hat_vec)]
  
  results$mean_rho_hat[i] <- mean(rho_hat_vec)
  results$sd_rho_hat[i] <- sd(rho_hat_vec)
}

print(results)
```


# Stopping criteron
```{r}
library(moments)
set.seed(123)

# Parameters
B <- c(2, 12, 5)
m <- length(B)
S_fixed <- 26          
tau_init <- 0        
tau_max <- 100          
tau_step <- 2       
beta0 <- 12
gamma0 <- c(0.05, 0.07, 0.06)
alpha0 <- c(10, 12, 15)
p <- c(0.9, 0.8, 0.85)
q <- c(0.2, 0.15, 0.3)

n_sim <- 1000          
epsilon <- 0.001  

# Function to compute X_true given tau
compute_X_true <- function(tau) {
  sapply(1:m, function(j) {
    alpha0[j] * (1 - exp(-gamma0[j]*(p[j] - q[j])*tau))/(p[j] - q[j])
  })
}

# One Monte Carlo simulation
one_simulation <- function(S, tau, X_true) {
  N_0 <- rpois(1, S*beta0*tau)
  beta_hat <- N_0/(S*tau)
  
  gamma_hat <- numeric(m)
  alpha_hat <- numeric(m)
  
  for (j in 1:m) {
    Lambda_j <- S*gamma0[j]*(alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j])*X_true[j])*tau
    N_j <- rpois(1, Lambda_j)
    if (N_j == 0) return(NA)
    
    gamma_hat[j] <- N_j/(S*tau*(alpha0[j] - (p[j] - q[j])*X_true[j]))
    alpha_hat[j] <- N_j/(S*gamma_hat[j]*tau) + (p[j] - q[j])*X_true[j]
  }
  
  denom <- beta_hat + sum(gamma_hat*(alpha_hat - (p - q)*X_true))
  if (denom <= 0) return(NA)
  
  rho_hat <- beta_hat / denom
  return(rho_hat)
}


tau_values <- seq(tau_init, tau_max, by = tau_step)
results_tau <- data.frame(
  tau = tau_values,
  rho_true = NA,
  mean_rho_hat = NA,
  rel_change = NA)

rho_prev <- NA
optimal_tau <- NA

# Loop over tau values
for (i in seq_along(tau_values)) {
  tau <- tau_values[i]
  X_true <- compute_X_true(tau)
  
  rho_hat_vec <- replicate(n_sim, one_simulation(S_fixed, tau, X_true))
  rho_hat_vec <- rho_hat_vec[!is.na(rho_hat_vec)]
  
  rho_mean <- mean(rho_hat_vec)
  rho_sd <- sd(rho_hat_vec)
  
  # Relative change
  if (!is.na(rho_prev)) {
    rel_change <- abs(rho_prev - rho_mean) / rho_mean
  } else {
    rel_change <- NA
  }
  
  # Store results
  results_tau$rho_true[i] <- beta0/(beta0 + sum(gamma0*alpha0*exp(-gamma0*(p - q)*tau)))
  results_tau$mean_rho_hat[i] <- rho_mean
  results_tau$rel_change[i] <- rel_change
  
  # Check stopping criterion
  if (!is.na(rel_change) && rel_change < epsilon && is.na(optimal_tau)) {
    optimal_tau <- tau
  }
  
  rho_prev <- rho_mean
}
print(results_tau)
cat("Optimal stopping time based on relative change <", epsilon, "is:", optimal_tau, "\n")

stop_index <- which(results_tau$rel_change < 0.001)[1]  
tau_stop <- results_tau$tau[stop_index]

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(results_tau, aes(x = tau)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = rho_true, color = "True reliability"), size = 1) +
  geom_line(aes(y = mean_rho_hat, color = "Estimated reliability"), linetype = "dotted", size = 1) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = tau_stop, color = "Stopping time"), size = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("True reliability" = "yellow", "Estimated reliability" = "darkred", "Stopping time" = "darkblue")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = expression(tau),
    y = expression(hat(rho)),
    title = "System Reliability vs Stopping Time",
    color = NULL   # removes legend title (cleaner)
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
```
